title: Market Snapshot Backfill
success_criteria_json: ["Each listed event has a cutoff-valid model-supported market snapshot archived under data/market_snapshots.", "The selected snapshot timestamp is at or before the replay cutoff for that event.", "Replay analysis reports no missing supported-market snapshot for the listed events."]

title: After-Cutoff Market Replacement
success_criteria_json: ["Existing after-cutoff seed or backfilled rows are replaced by cutoff-valid rows or remain excluded.", "Replay analysis still records excluded late rows as diagnostics without using them for prediction."]

title: Source Archive Proof
success_criteria_json: ["Each retrospective source has pre-cutoff archive proof or is replaced by a pre-cutoff source snapshot.", "Source audit reports archive-backed snapshots instead of unverified retrospective snapshots."]

title: Model Calibration Review
success_criteria_json: ["Re-run predict and calibration reports after input blockers are fixed.", "Inspect misses, actual-winner ranks, and overconfidence before promoting any edge claim."]
